data.title: Tesla CEO Elon Musk Reveals Reason Behind Dropping Company Logo On Cybercab: 'If The Product Is Special Enough...'
data.description: Tesla CEO Elon Musk explains decision to not include logo on Cybercab, saying if product is special enough, no logo is needed.

data.title: Elon Musk Mocks Tesla Shorts After Stock Hits $400 In Overnight Trading On Robinhood
data.description: Tesla CEO Elon Musk mocked short sellers of the company on Sunday after the stock breached $400 on Robinhood's overnight trading service.

data.title: Expert Slams Trump's Tariff Policies As 'Completely And Utterly Wrong' But Says 'We Don't Think They Are Going To Do Anything...'
data.description: He also predicted significant market volatility in the upcoming year due to the tariff discussions.

data.title: AI Robot Trader Goes All-In On Tesla, Betting Big On Elon Musk's Momentum Amid Trump Trade Plays
data.description: The fintech firm, which manages approximately $50 million across three ETFs, utilizes AI-driven strategies to rebalance its portfolio monthly
